promises.text: Fight for a 355-ship Navy floor and strengthen the Newport News shipbuilding industrial base
Grow defense manufacturing jobs and lower energy costs for 1st District families
Secure full disability, healthcare, and education benefits for veterans and military families
Connect rural 1st District communities to high-speed internet through the First District Broadband Task Force
Modernize roads, bridges, and ports to support military bases and rural economies across the district
Restore Chesapeake Bay water quality and protect local fishermen and farmers from polluters
Rebuild Norfolk Naval Shipyard and Hampton Roads' defense industrial base to counter China's expanding navy
Reduce PCS moves through the STAY Act and expand TRICARE and childcare access at NAS Oceana and Fort Story
Expand VA mental health resources and pass the FAIR Vets Act, Fit Vets Act, and Veterans Career Connection Act
Extend ACA premium tax credits, lower prescription costs for seniors, and expand access to nursing careers
Expand the Child Tax Credit, cut wasteful spending, and claw back fraudulent COVID-era funds
Secure the southern border, stop fentanyl trafficking, and hold China accountable for the drug crisis
As Ranking Member of Education & Workforce Committee, expand early childhood education, raise the minimum wage, and protect workers' right to organize through the PRO Act
Support Newport News Shipbuilding and Naval Station Norfolk, fund Ford-class carriers and Virginia-class submarines, and strengthen military installation resilience against flooding
Reduce mandatory minimums, end mass incarceration, and pass evidence-based reforms to lower recidivism and address racial disparities in sentencing
Defend voting rights, combat racial discrimination, and protect civil liberties for all communities in Hampton Roads
Oppose offshore drilling off Virginia's coast, support the Green New Deal, and protect the Chesapeake Bay from pollution and sea level rise
Protect and expand the Affordable Care Act, support a single-payer system, and lower costs for Hampton Roads families
Protect Medicaid from cuts, lower prescription drug costs, and fight the Republican budget's rollbacks of ACA coverage for low-income Virginians
Reduce Black maternal mortality through the Child Care Assistance for Maternal Health Act and expand postpartum mental health support
Fight pollution in disadvantaged communities, defend EPA standards, and oppose budget cuts gutting clean energy and climate programs
Support NDAA quality-of-life improvements for troops at Fort Gregg-Adams and protect civilian defense workers from mass layoffs
Secure community project funding for Richmond-area broadband, housing, and infrastructure to grow the district's economy from the bottom up
Defend voting rights, advance racial justice, and oppose Trump administration efforts to dismantle DEI programs and democratic institutions
Champion a modern, lethal military through the NDAA — funding the Golden Dome, F-47, Virginia-class submarines, and a 3.8% servicemember pay raise
Pass the One Big Beautiful Bill to eliminate taxes on tips, overtime, and deliver tax deductions for seniors and small businesses
Introduce the VA Data Transparency and Trust Act and fully fund military construction and VA benefits for servicemembers and their families
Support the Laken Riley Act, counter cartel drone threats on the southern border, and enforce immigration law to protect American communities
Advance American energy dominance, support Danville's Goodyear plant by rolling back EPA overreach on manufacturers
Lead bipartisan Quantum Encryption Readiness and Resilience Act to protect America from quantum computing cybersecurity threats
Lower inflation for Valley families and farmers by increasing energy production and cutting federal spending through the One Big Beautiful Bill
Increase domestic energy production to lower gas and utility bills and reduce dependence on foreign energy sources
Pass burn pit legislation, expand veteran mental health and suicide prevention programs, and eliminate the widow's tax for Gold Star families
Lower prescription drug and insurance costs using free-market solutions while protecting patients with pre-existing conditions
Pass the Secure the Border Act to end illegal immigration and stop fentanyl from flowing into Shenandoah Valley communities
Cut wasteful federal spending, rein in government overreach, and keep parents in control of their children's education
Defend Ukraine's sovereignty by passing the Sanctioning Russia Act, releasing $3.85B in approved weapons, and countering Russian aggression as an HASC member
Secure NDAA wins for Fort Walker, phone-free DoDEA classrooms, reservist school access, and protect 55,000 federal defense workers from DOGE firings
Lower energy bills, pass the TUTOR Act for teacher financial relief, and fight the One Big Beautiful Bill's cuts to SNAP and Medicaid
Oppose the Stafford County ICE mega-detention facility, demand body cameras and judicial warrants for ICE, and hold the administration accountable
Protect UVA's independence, pass the Charting My Path Act for student success, and expand TUTOR Act financial relief for teachers in the 7th District
Build local food supply chains through the bipartisan Local FARM Act and support Prince William and Stafford farmers and small businesses
Champion bipartisan climate legislation through the SAFE Vehicles Rule, carbon pricing, and clean energy tax credits to reach net-zero emissions
Introduce legislation to rehire illegally fired federal workers and protect the 8th District's federal workforce from DOGE mass purges
Introduce the National Gun Violence Research Act to fund evidence-based research and pass universal background checks and an assault weapons ban
Protect the ACA, expand Medicaid, and ensure no family faces economic ruin from a health crisis by opposing One Big Beautiful Bill Medicaid cuts
Hold DOGE and executive agencies accountable through legislation requiring agency heads to publicly disclose schedules and bar foreign investment by former officials
Expand federal R&D investment, protect NSF and NIH from budget cuts, and grow Northern Virginia's tech and defense innovation economy
Protect coal jobs, fund abandoned mine land reclamation grants, and pass the EPA Regulatory Relief Act to cut burdens on Southwest Virginia manufacturers
Permanently classify fentanyl analogs as Schedule I substances and lead Health Subcommittee efforts to reduce opioid addiction through treatment and prevention
Protect rural hospitals like Clinch Valley Medical Center from Medicaid cuts and expand telehealth access across Southwest Virginia as Health Subcommittee chair
Fight EPA overreach on Virginia farmers and oppose the Waters of the United States rule that burdens landowners and the timber industry
Cut taxes and regulations to grow manufacturing jobs and revitalize coal communities through abandoned mine site reclamation and private investment
Ensure every defense dollar targets real national security priorities, honor military commitments to veterans, and require Congressional approval before military engagement
Demand a national strategic data center plan to stop unregulated expansion from raising utility bills and harming neighborhoods in Virginia's data center capital
Protect 36,000 district federal workers and contractors from DOGE firings and government shutdowns through the Keep Main Street Open and Shutdown Guidance Acts
Permanently extend ACA premium tax credits, pass the Medicaid PNA Modernization Act, and oppose One Big Beautiful Bill cuts to seniors and disabled Virginians

As Ranking Member of the Military and Foreign Affairs Oversight Subcommittee, hold the administration accountable for Signal leaks, classified mishandling, and unauthorized foreign military facilities
Advance bipartisan quantum encryption legislation with Rep. McGuire and the HEALTHY BRAINS Act to protect American cybersecurity and fund neurodegenerative disease research
Pass the bipartisan Uyghur Human Rights Protection Act to grant refugee status to persecuted Uyghurs, home to one of the largest Uyghur diaspora communities in the US
Introduce bills to block DOGE mass firings, guarantee back pay for furloughed contractors, and require Congressional approval before slashing federal agencies
Increase housing supply to meet Fairfax County's goal of 10,000 affordable units by 2034 and keep Fairfax affordable for working families
Attract high-quality jobs, invest in rail and broadband infrastructure, and grow Northern Virginia's AI, space, and quantum technology sectors
Defend Title I and special education funding from Trump cuts and secure full state funding for Fairfax County Public Schools
Extend ACA subsidies, restore Medicaid cuts, and ensure healthcare is a right for every Fairfax County resident
Invest in clean energy and green jobs, make Fairfax carbon neutral, and expand Chesapeake Bay Restoration Program funding
